title: Tiny Shields and Totems
description: A simple, performance-friendly resource pack that shrinks the totem of undying and shield in first-person view, giving you cleaner visibility without changing vanilla textures.
body:
# Tiny Shields and Totems

**Tiny Shields and Totems** is a lightweight resource pack that reduces the size of the totem of undying and shield in first-person view, giving you a cleaner, less obstructed perspective, especially useful in combat, exploration, and recording/streaming.

## Before:
![an image of how the default totems and shields look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82cb20a8787a509dfb6a9541069fb328462d5d5c.png)

## After:
![an image of how the updated shield and totems look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f36610a9554a6e7555f6664dddddff094f7fac1.png)

## Tiny Totem When Activated
![postmortal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50a31f4473c7bc3a5d006e8c2c343a502becb1bc.png)

## Features

1. Compact Totem: The totem of undying is scaled down so it no longer dominates the right side of your screen while holding it.

2. Slimmer Shield: The shield is trimmed to take up less of your view when blocking, so you can actually see what's coming at you.

3. No Performance Impact: Pure model and texture changes only. Zero FPS cost.

4. Vanilla-Faithful: Keeps the original textures and animations intact, just smaller.

## Why Use This?

Holding a totem or shield in vanilla Minecraft can block a significant chunk of your screen. This pack is built for players who want maximum visibility without sacrificing the functionality or aesthetic of either item, making it great for PvP, speedrunning, hardcore mode, or just everyday play.
Compatibility

_Compatible with most other resource packs (load this above packs that modify HUD or item models to ensure priority)
Works with OptiFine, Sodium + Iris, and vanilla_
